name: Load Basic Building Blocks
notes:
This rule loads building blocks that need to be run to assist with reporting.  This rule has no actions or responses.

Do not customize this rule. Customizations to this rule will prevent future updates to this rule from taking effect. Customize the 'User Load Basic Building Blocks' rule instead. 

If customizations have been applied to this rule, copy the existing rule data to 'User Load Basic Building Blocks', enable it, and then revert this rule to it's initial state.
